commands.review_summary:
The PR publishes enabled plugin-manifest skill directories into the managed skills root via symlinks, adds regression tests, and adds a changelog entry for the linked bug.

Reproducibility: yes. source-based. Current main resolves enabled plugin skill paths and loads them as low-precedence extra dirs, but no current path publishes them to the managed or personal agent discovery roots named in the linked issue; the PR-introduced precedence and cleanup defects are also reproducible from the diff.
